pattern: Build a lookup from the knowledge list, then scan the string once and substitute each bracketed key with its value or a question mark when unknown.
hints: Turn the list of key-value pairs into a dictionary for constant-time lookups.
Walk the string copying ordinary characters, but when you hit an opening bracket gather the key until the closing bracket.
For each gathered key, append its mapped value if present, otherwise append a single question mark, and continue scanning after the closing bracket.

edge_inputs.description: unknown key becomes a question mark
same key reused and literal letters left alone
empty knowledge means every key is unknown
value containing letters that look like a key but are not re-evaluated

stress.description: long string of random bracketed keys with a partial knowledge map
